1. Conduct a full system audit of Zerenthis to identify current performance bottlenecks, security issues, and usability problems.
2. Gather user feedback from Austin on current pain points and desired features.
3. Research latest AI and system integration advancements relevant to Zerenthis.
4. Prioritize improvements based on impact and feasibility.
5. Develop a roadmap for implementation including timelines and resource allocation.
6. Begin incremental development and testing of prioritized features and fixes.
7. Continuously monitor system performance and user satisfaction post-updates.

1. Conduct a comprehensive audit of the current Zerenthis system to identify performance bottlenecks, security vulnerabilities, and user experience issues.
2. Gather Austin's specific goals and pain points with the current system to align improvements with his expectations.
3. Research and integrate advanced AI and automation features that can enhance Zerenthis's responsiveness and capabilities.
4. Develop a modular upgrade plan prioritizing critical fixes and high-impact features.
5. Implement continuous monitoring and feedback mechanisms to iteratively improve the system post-upgrade.
